patch.value: Dedupe history-rewrite orchestration block triplicated across history-redact/repair/compact

Follow-up to closed pm-kbm9 (PR#74), which dedup'd checkHistoryRewriteOwnership + verifyHistoryRewriteNoDrift as helpers but left the surrounding ~50-line orchestration triplicated: verifyHistoryChain error -> ownership warnings -> acquireLock(pmRoot, subject.id, ttl, author, force, force_required_for_stale_lock) -> verifyHistoryRewriteNoDrift -> writeFileAtomic(historyEntriesToRaw) with rollback -> release. Sites: src/cli/commands/history-redact.ts ~525-600, src/cli/commands/history-repair.ts ~165-240, src/cli/commands/history-compact.ts ~310-380. Extract an executeHistoryRewrite({operation, subject, rewrittenEntries, itemDocument, author, force, settings, typeRegistry, historyRawBeforeLock, currentItemRawBeforeLock, dryRun}) helper in src/core/history (next to replay.ts/history-rewrite helpers); each command keeps only its rewrite computation. Bonus: a small 100%-coverable core module per the coverage tactic.
